content: Fix memory inefficiency in chunked_sparse_cor - implement true sparse correlation computation
Optimize compute_subject_connectivity_graph_sparse to avoid full correlation matrix computation
Fix race condition risk in task_hatsa_helpers.R process_subjects function
Improve eigen decomposition strategy in compute_spectral_sketch_sparse
Add error recovery and fallback methods to solve_gev_laplacian_primme
Fix unbounded memory growth in process_subjects (task_hatsa_helpers.R)
Clarify sparse matrix handling in validate_hatsa_inputs
Define package constants for magic numbers (tolerances, defaults)
Add caching layer for expensive operations (eigendecompositions, SVDs)
Run tests after implementing fixes to ensure no regressions
